features.title: Real-Time Stability Index
features.description: A composite psychological stability score (0–100) calculated in real time during your trading session, based on configurable behavioral inputs.

features.title: Session-by-Session Tracking
features.description: Automatically records each trading session, allowing you to review your psychological patterns over time and identify recurring stress triggers.

features.title: Threshold Alerts
features.description: Set personal stability thresholds. Receive in-platform alerts when your index drops below your chosen level — a signal to pause and reassess.

features.title: NinjaTrader 8 Native
features.description: Built exclusively for NinjaTrader 8. Runs as an indicator panel directly inside your existing NinjaTrader workspace — no external software needed.

features.title: 100% Local — No Data Uploads
features.description: All analysis runs on your machine. Your trading data and behavioral patterns are never sent to any server. Complete privacy by design.

features.title: Historical Analysis
features.description: Export session data to CSV and review your psychological stability trends alongside your trading P&L to identify behavioral patterns over time.
